# DAS Group LLC

> DAS Group LLC builds applied AI products for legal workflows, support operations, product execution, compliance work, commerce operations, and local-first knowledge work.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://dasgroupllc.com/): Portfolio overview, product categories, and direct answers about the company.
- [Portfolio full context](https://dasgroupllc.com/llms-full.txt): Expanded company and product context in one file.

## Product index

- [CourtFile](https://courtfile.dasgroupllc.com/): Court filing review workflows and matter-brief generation for litigation teams.
- [CiteClear](https://citeclear.dasgroupllc.com/): Citation verification and source-quality review.
- [SpecBot](https://specbot.dasgroupllc.com/): Linear issue quality gates for cleaner engineering handoff.
- [ResolveAI for Shopify](https://resolveai.dasgroupllc.com/): Policy-aware autonomous support resolution for Shopify merchants.
- [ResolveAI for Zendesk](https://resolveai-zendesk.dasgroupllc.com/): Outcome-based AI ticket resolution for Zendesk teams.
- [ProfitPulse AI](https://profitpulse-ai.dasgroupllc.com/): Profit-leak detection and margin protection for Shopify stores.
- [ThoughtLint](https://thoughtlint.dasgroupllc.com/): Local-first Obsidian plugin for reasoning review.
- [ProtoVid](https://dasgroupllc.com/protovid/): Figma prototype export to MP4 and GIF.

## iOS apps (App Store)

iPhone apps by DAS Group LLC. Each link is the canonical product page with a direct App Store download link.

- [TrackWell Daily](https://dasgroupllc.com/apps/trackwell/): Simple nutrition tracker for water, protein, and vegetables. One-tap logging, no calorie counting or food databases.
- [LifeGarden](https://dasgroupllc.com/apps/lifegarden/): Visual habit tracker where each habit grows into a living plant. Build streaks and daily routines; the plant wilts if you skip.
- [VoiceJournal](https://dasgroupllc.com/apps/voicejournal/): Voice-first journaling app that transcribes what you say and detects your mood automatically, fully on-device.
- [QuickScan](https://dasgroupllc.com/apps/quickscan/): Fast iPhone document scanner that turns any document into a clean PDF with OCR text extraction and signatures, offline.
- [Scan Receipts](https://dasgroupllc.com/apps/receipts/): AI receipt scanner that reads merchant, date, total, and category from any receipt and exports tax-ready expense reports.
- [Photo Converter](https://dasgroupllc.com/apps/photo-converter/): On-device photo format converter (HEIC, JPG, PNG, WebP) with one-tap AI background removal. No uploads.
- [ADHDFocus](https://dasgroupllc.com/apps/adhdfocus/): ADHD focus timer that breaks overwhelming tasks into small starter steps and runs short Pomodoro sessions to help you start.
- [AffirmDaily](https://dasgroupllc.com/apps/affirmdaily/): Daily affirmations app that matches one affirmation to your mood each morning using on-device AI.
- [Mood Tracker (CopeCalm)](https://dasgroupllc.com/apps/copecalm/): Anxiety and panic relief toolkit with 60-second breathing exercises, grounding, and mood tracking. Works offline.
- [StrongHer](https://dasgroupllc.com/apps/strongher/): Strength training app built for women, including workouts for postpartum, menopause, and pelvic-floor recovery.
- [TrackFasts](https://dasgroupllc.com/apps/trackfasts/): Intermittent fasting timer focused on keeping your streak alive, with 16:8, 18:6, 20:4, and OMAD protocols.
- [Be Ridiculous AI](https://dasgroupllc.com/apps/be-ridiculous/): AI activity generator that suggests something to do based on your mood, energy, and who you are with.
- [WOD Timer Pro](https://dasgroupllc.com/apps/crossfit-timer/): Interval workout timer with AMRAP, EMOM, Tabata, and For Time modes, voice cues, and Apple Watch support.
- [Invoices & Time Tracker](https://dasgroupllc.com/apps/invoices/): Invoice maker for freelancers and contractors to create and send professional PDF invoices in under a minute.

## Portfolio summary

- DAS Group products are organized around concrete jobs rather than generic AI assistance.
- Typical portfolio themes: grounded workflows, explicit guardrails, measurable outputs, and machine-readable product context.
- Primary audiences: litigation teams, support teams, product and engineering teams, Shopify merchants, and knowledge workers.

## Contact

- Support: support@dasgroupllc.com
